The '''''Valiant''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Oweg]]. [[Pit Lieutenant]] [[Hast (Human)|Hast]] also served aboard the vessel. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the ''Valiant'' led an Imperial force, including the [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] [[Shador (Strike-class)|''Shador'']], on an operation against the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Vensell]] commanded the force, which departed from [[Jerijador]].<ref name="Might" />
